market: # Fill one row per selection you spot-check. Same fixture
#   market      = the standardized market name as TiTiBet stores it (e.g. "Over 1.5"
#   proxy_odd   = the odd TiTiBet shows for that selection (its William Hill / sharp line).
#   my_book_odd = the odd YOUR book (betPawa / 888bets / Betway) offers for the SAME selection.
# Lines starting with '#' are ignored. Aim for 5+ rows per market you actually bet.
# Delete these example rows once you start entering real prices.
